records.question: What are the id and name of the museum visited most times?
records.gold_sql: SELECT t2.Museum_ID ,  t1.name FROM museum AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID GROUP BY t2.Museum_ID ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.Museum_ID, m.Name
FROM museum m
JOIN visit v ON m.Museum_ID = v.Museum_ID
GROUP BY m.Museum_ID, m.Name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

records.question: Find all airlines that have at least 10 flights.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING count(*)  >  10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.Airline
FROM airlines a
JOIN flights f ON a.uid = f.Airline
GROUP BY a.uid, a.Airline
HAVING COUNT(f.FlightNo) >= 10

records.question: How many poker players are there?
records.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM poker_player
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM poker_player

records.question: For students who have pets , how many pets does each student have ? list their ids instead of names .
records.gold_sql: select count(*) ,  t1.stuid from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid group by t1.stuid
records.pred_sql:
SELECT StuID, COUNT(PetID) as pet_count
FROM Has_Pet
GROUP BY StuID
ORDER BY StuID

records.question: Which professionals live in a city containing the substring 'West'? List his or her role, street, city and state.
records.gold_sql: SELECT role_code ,  street ,  city ,  state FROM professionals WHERE city LIKE '%West%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.role_code, p.street, p.city, p.state
FROM Professionals p
WHERE p.city LIKE '%West%'

records.question: What is the average horsepower of the cars before 1980?
records.gold_sql: SELECT avg(horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  <  1980;
records.pred_sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(Horsepower AS REAL)) FROM cars_data WHERE Year < 1980 AND Horsepower IS NOT NULL AND Horsepower != ''

records.question: How many contestants did not get voted?
records.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM contestants WHERE contestant_number NOT IN ( SELECT contestant_number FROM votes )
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONTESTANTS WHERE contestant_number NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT contestant_number FROM VOTES)

records.question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T3.killed)  >  10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.name
FROM battle b
JOIN ship s ON b.id = s.lost_in_battle
JOIN death d ON s.id = d.caused_by_ship_id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
HAVING SUM(d.killed) > 10

records.question: What are the names of the singers who performed in a concert in 2014?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN singer AS T2 ON T1.singer_id  =  T2.singer_id JOIN concert AS T3 ON T1.concert_id  =  T3.concert_id WHERE T3.year  =  2014
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name
FROM singer s
INNER JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON s.Singer_ID = sic.Singer_ID
INNER JOIN concert c ON sic.concert_ID = c.concert_ID
WHERE c.Year = '2014'

records.question: What are the countries that have greater surface area than any country in Europe?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE SurfaceArea  >  (SELECT min(SurfaceArea) FROM country WHERE Continent  =  "Europe")
records.pred_sql: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE SurfaceArea > (SELECT MAX(SurfaceArea) FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Europe')

records.question: Find the names of employees who never won any award in the evaluation.
records.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM employee WHERE Employee_ID NOT IN (SELECT Employee_ID FROM evaluation)
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.Name
FROM employee e
WHERE e.Employee_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Employee_ID FROM evaluation)

records.question: What are the names of properties that are either houses or apartments with more than 1 room?
records.gold_sql: SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "House" UNION SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "Apartment" AND room_count  >  1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.property_name
FROM Properties p
JOIN Ref_Property_Types rpt ON p.property_type_code = rpt.property_type_code
WHERE (rpt.property_type_description = 'House' OR rpt.property_type_description = 'Apartment')
AND p.room_count > 1

records.question: For each citizenship, how many singers are from that country?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Citizenship ,  COUNT(*) FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Citizenship, COUNT(*) as singer_count
FROM singer
GROUP BY Citizenship

records.question: How many different departments offer degrees?
records.gold_sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT department_id) FROM Degree_Programs
records.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT department_id) FROM Degree_Programs

records.question: What are the ids of students who both have friends and are liked?
records.gold_sql: SELECT student_id FROM Friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM Likes
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT h.ID
FROM Highschooler h
WHERE h.ID IN (SELECT student_id FROM Friend)
AND h.ID IN (SELECT liked_id FROM Likes)

records.question: How many matches were played in each year?
records.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) ,  YEAR FROM matches GROUP BY YEAR
records.pred_sql:
SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', tourney_date) AS year, COUNT(*) AS matches_played
FROM matches
GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y', tourney_date)
ORDER BY year

records.question: What are the orchestras that do not have any performances?
records.gold_sql: SELECT Orchestra FROM orchestra WHERE Orchestra_ID NOT IN (SELECT Orchestra_ID FROM performance)
records.pred_sql:
SELECT o.Orchestra
FROM orchestra o
LEFT JOIN performance p ON o.Orchestra_ID = p.Orchestra_ID
WHERE p.Performance_ID IS NULL

records.question: What is the document id, template id and description for document named "Robbin CV"?
records.gold_sql: SELECT document_id ,  template_id ,  Document_Description FROM Documents WHERE document_name  =  "Robbin CV"
records.pred_sql: SELECT Document_ID, Template_ID, Document_Description FROM Documents WHERE Document_Name = 'Robbin CV'

records.question: Show the hometowns shared by at least two teachers.
records.gold_sql: SELECT Hometown FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Hometown
FROM teacher
GROUP BY Hometown
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

records.question: What are the package options and the name of the series for the TV Channel that supports high definition TV?
records.gold_sql: SELECT package_option ,  series_name FROM TV_Channel WHERE hight_definition_TV  =  "yes"
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT TV_Channel.Package_Option, TV_Channel.series_name
FROM TV_Channel
WHERE TV_Channel.Hight_definition_TV = 'Yes' OR TV_Channel.Hight_definition_TV = 'TRUE' OR TV_Channel.Hight_definition_TV = '1'
